TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Yohani Hafod == Yohani Hafod (Inkiris: John Harvard, 1607 miheca 11 folad 26 romi'ad - 1638 miheca 9 folad 14 romi'ad), o nano Charles niyaro' i Massachusetts a foksi. Pa'ayaway patireng to Hafod daykako a tamdaw. Kaemangan miheca I 1607 miheca 11 folad 26 rmi'ad masofoc itini i Southwark no England niyaro' Ci Yohani Hafod, itira a mato'as, o saka sasepat a wawa to sasiwaay nangra a malekaka. O mipacokay to 'a'adopen ato tawki no kaliepahan ko mama ni Hafod, o mama no ina a akong ningra o malaiingay no niyaro', o nano malekapotay to mama ni mikikiay Sasepiya (Shakespeare) a matayal i cisifo. I 1625 miheca, ona tahalifong a mapatay ko mama ato sasepatay a salekaka to fa'inayan fafahiyan ningra itiya, ikor miliyaw ci fa'inay ko ina. Itiya i 1627 miheca mapatayra no mama ato ina cingra i Emmanuel kakkoyin (aniniay Cambridge daykako) minanam, i 1631 miheca misawad padoedo haca minanam, i 1635 miheca ciniala to sose, nanoya mapatireng cingra to kala foksi. I 1638 miheca 9 folad 14 romi'ad, mararamod to safa to cefang i daykako ni Hafod mitilid a fafahiyan, saka 2 miheca to 11 folad malahakelong tayra i New England sa'etal a Charleston niyaro', oya aniniay Boston i Massachusetts sa'etal, itini toya niyaro' a kiwkay malafoksi ato malaciwlo pasifana'ay. Rocok a paror I 1638 miheca 9 folad 14 romi'ad, ciadada to fala'an mapatay ci Hafo, i'ayaw no patay ningra o kalotilid a hong ato malitosaay sera a paloma'an (salongan 780 Inpang a payso, o tatodong no picalap to Massachusetts cecayay miheca a mialaan a sata) pafelien ko fa'elohay kakkoyin (New College, caayay koya Oxford daykako fa'elohay kakoyin). O pipatodong to nga'ayay a demak, itiyaay nicalapay citodongay mitelek no Massachusetts i 1639 miheca micering tonini a kakoying falicen ko ngangan "Hafod kakoyin" han to, oya ikoray Hafod daykako. I 1884 miheca, oya mito'to'ay ci Daniel French mipatala misanga' to sinalit no Yohani Hafod nasa, o nikahalafin to no mihecaan, awaay ko nicokaan a siyasin, saka ci French sato, mitama ningra ko tatoloay a Model, masanga' ko sinalit ni Yohani Hafod . Sacitilid sa i laeno a toloay rowis: Yohani Hafod , mipatirengay tamdaw, 1638. I 1924 miheca 4 folad 15 romi'ad, o sinalit ni Yohani Hafod malinah patayra i laloma'an no pitilidan, o misawaday naitini mitiliday saraheked sa ko sowal: onini a sinalit nai papotal micomod to i niyaro', nai palapalaan micomod to tayni laloma'an. Kahemakan a katengilan Saki mitiliday no Hafod daykako i, o 'alomanay mitiliday sito, 'ayaw no piseking tayra i sinalit ni Hafod mipohpoh to kocu saka cilemed miseking, kamatini no romi'adan, onini a kawiliay wa'ay satomeli' sato. Pi'arawan Pinengneng a tilid
S.PHON: == jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 == jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 (inkiris: *o~u魔n 魔arb~var涩~僧, **** mi魔蓹师a ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 - **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧), o~u nano~u 师魔ar删蓹s nijaro~u省 i massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts a fo~uksi. pa省ajawaj patir蓹艐 to~u 魔afo~u涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u a tam涩~僧aw. ka蓹ma艐an mi魔蓹师a i **** mi魔蓹师a ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ** rmi省a涩~僧 maso~ufo~u师 itini i so~uo~u~ut魔wark no~u 蓹艐删an涩~僧 nijaro~u省 师i jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧, itira a mato~u省as, o~u saka sas蓹pat a wawa to~u sasiwaaj na艐ra a ma删蓹kaka. o~u mipa师o~ukaj to~u 省a省a涩~僧o~up蓹n ato~u tawki no~u ka删i蓹pa魔an ko~u mama ni 魔afo~u涩~僧, o~u mama no~u ina a ako~u艐 ni艐ra o~u ma删aii艐aj no~u nijaro~u省, o~u nano~u ma删蓹kapo~utaj to~u mama ni mikikiaj sas蓹pija (s魔ak蓹sp蓹ar蓹) a mataja删 i 师isifo~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a, o~una ta魔a删ifo~u艐 a mapataj ko~u mama ato~u sas蓹pataj a sa删蓹kaka to~u fa省inajan fafa魔ijan ni艐ra itija, iko~ur mi删ijaw 师i fa省inaj ko~u ina. itija i **** mi魔蓹师a mapatajra no~u mama ato~u ina 师i艐ra i 蓹mmano~u~u蓹删 kakko~ujin (aniniaj 师amb~b~vri涩~僧*蓹 涩~僧ajkako~u) minanam, i **** mi魔蓹师a misawa涩~僧 pa涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u 魔a师a minanam, i **** mi魔蓹师a 师inia删a to~u so~us蓹, nano~uja mapatir蓹艐 师i艐ra to~u ka删a fo~uksi. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, mararamo~u涩~僧 to~u safa to~u 师蓹fa艐 i 涩~僧ajkako~u ni 魔afo~u涩~僧 miti删i涩~僧 a fafa魔ijan, saka * mi魔蓹师a to~u ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ma删a魔ak蓹删o~u艐 tajra i n蓹w 蓹艐删an涩~僧 sa省蓹ta删 a 师魔ar删蓹sto~un nijaro~u省, o~uja aniniaj b~b~vo~usto~un i massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts sa省蓹ta删, itini to~uja nijaro~u省 a kiwkaj ma删afo~uksi ato~u ma删a师iw删o~u pasifana省aj. ro~u师o~uk a paro~ur i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, 师ia涩~僧a涩~僧a to~u fa删a省an mapataj 师i 魔afo~u, i省ajaw no~u pataj ni艐ra o~u ka删o~uti删i涩~僧 a 魔o~u艐 ato~u ma删ito~usaaj s蓹ra a pa删o~uma省an (sa删o~u艐an *** inpa艐 a pajso~u, o~u tato~u涩~僧o~u艐 no~u pi师a删ap to~u massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts 师蓹师ajaj mi魔蓹师a a mia删aan a sata) paf蓹删i蓹n ko~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj kakko~ujin (n蓹w 师o~u删删蓹*蓹, 师aajaj ko~uja o~uxfo~ur涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj kako~ujin). o~u pipato~u涩~僧o~u艐 to~u 艐a省ajaj a 涩~僧蓹mak, itijaaj ni师a删apaj 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj mit蓹删蓹k no~u massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts i **** mi魔蓹师a mi师蓹ri艐 to~unini a kako~uji艐 fa删i师蓹n ko~u 艐a艐an "魔afo~u涩~僧 kako~ujin" 魔an to~u, o~uja iko~uraj 魔afo~u涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a, o~uja mito~u省to~u省aj 师i 涩~僧ani蓹删 fr蓹n师魔 mipata删a misa艐a省 to~u sina删it no~u jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 nasa, o~u nika魔a删afin to~u no~u mi魔蓹师aan, awaaj ko~u ni师o~ukaan a sijasin, saka 师i fr蓹n师魔 sato~u, mitama ni艐ra ko~u tato~u删o~uaj a mo~u涩~僧蓹删, masa艐a省 ko~u sina删it ni jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 . sa师iti删i涩~僧 sa i 删a蓹no~u a to~u删o~uaj ro~uwis: jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 , mipatir蓹艐aj tam涩~僧aw, ****. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, o~u sina删it ni jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 ma删ina魔 patajra i 删a删o~uma省an no~u piti删i涩~僧an, o~u misawa涩~僧aj naitini miti删i涩~僧aj sara魔蓹k蓹涩~僧 sa ko~u so~uwa删: o~unini a sina删it nai papo~uta删 mi师o~umo~u涩~僧 to~u i nijaro~u省, nai pa删apa删aan mi师o~umo~u涩~僧 to~u tajni 删a删o~uma省an. ka魔蓹makan a kat蓹艐i删an saki miti删i涩~僧aj no~u 魔afo~u涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u i, o~u 省a删o~umanaj miti删i涩~僧aj sito~u, 省ajaw no~u pis蓹ki艐 tajra i sina删it ni 魔afo~u涩~僧 mipo~u魔po~u魔 to~u ko~u师o~u~u saka 师i删蓹m蓹涩~僧 mis蓹ki艐, kamatini no~u ro~umi省a涩~僧an, o~unini a kawi删iaj wa省aj sato~um蓹删i省 sato~u. pi省arawan pin蓹艐n蓹艐 a ti删i涩~僧
S.FORM: == Yohani Hafod == Yohani Hafod (Inkiris: John Harvard, 1607 miheca 11 folad 26 romi'ad - 1638 miheca 9 folad 14 romi'ad), o nano Charles niyaro' i Massachusetts a foksi. Pa'ayaway patireng to Hafod daykako a tamdaw. Kaemangan miheca I 1607 miheca 11 folad 26 rmi'ad masofoc itini i Southwark no England niyaro' Ci Yohani Hafod, itira a mato'as, o saka sasepat a wawa to sasiwaay nangra a malekaka. O mipacokay to 'a'adopen ato tawki no kaliepahan ko mama ni Hafod, o mama no ina a akong ningra o malaiingay no niyaro', o nano malekapotay to mama ni mikikiay Sasepiya (Shakespeare) a matayal i cisifo. I 1625 miheca, ona tahalifong a mapatay ko mama ato sasepatay a salekaka to fa'inayan fafahiyan ningra itiya, ikor miliyaw ci fa'inay ko ina. Itiya i 1627 miheca mapatayra no mama ato ina cingra i Emmanuel kakkoyin (aniniay Cambridge daykako) minanam, i 1631 miheca misawad padoedo haca minanam, i 1635 miheca ciniala to sose, nanoya mapatireng cingra to kala foksi. I 1638 miheca 9 folad 14 romi'ad, mararamod to safa to cefang i daykako ni Hafod mitilid a fafahiyan, saka 2 miheca to 11 folad malahakelong tayra i New England sa'etal a Charleston niyaro', oya aniniay Boston i Massachusetts sa'etal, itini toya niyaro' a kiwkay malafoksi ato malaciwlo pasifana'ay. Rocok a paror I 1638 miheca 9 folad 14 romi'ad, ciadada to fala'an mapatay ci Hafo, i'ayaw no patay ningra o kalotilid a hong ato malitosaay sera a paloma'an (salongan 780 Inpang a payso, o tatodong no picalap to Massachusetts cecayay miheca a mialaan a sata) pafelien ko fa'elohay kakkoyin (New College, caayay koya Oxford daykako fa'elohay kakoyin). O pipatodong to nga'ayay a demak, itiyaay nicalapay citodongay mitelek no Massachusetts i 1639 miheca micering tonini a kakoying falicen ko ngangan "Hafod kakoyin" han to, oya ikoray Hafod daykako. I 1884 miheca, oya mito'to'ay ci Daniel French mipatala misanga' to sinalit no Yohani Hafod nasa, o nikahalafin to no mihecaan, awaay ko nicokaan a siyasin, saka ci French sato, mitama ningra ko tatoloay a Model, masanga' ko sinalit ni Yohani Hafod . Sacitilid sa i laeno a toloay rowis: Yohani Hafod , mipatirengay tamdaw, 1638. I 1924 miheca 4 folad 15 romi'ad, o sinalit ni Yohani Hafod malinah patayra i laloma'an no pitilidan, o misawaday naitini mitiliday saraheked sa ko sowal: onini a sinalit nai papotal micomod to i niyaro', nai palapalaan micomod to tayni laloma'an. Kahemakan a katengilan Saki mitiliday no Hafod daykako i, o 'alomanay mitiliday sito, 'ayaw no piseking tayra i sinalit ni Hafod mipohpoh to kocu saka cilemed miseking, kamatini no romi'adan, onini a kawiliay wa'ay satomeli' sato. Pi'arawan Pinengneng a tilid
S.PHON: == jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 == jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 (inkiris: *o~u魔n 魔arb~var涩~僧, **** mi魔蓹师a ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 - **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧), o~u nano~u 师魔ar删蓹s nijaro~u省 i massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts a fo~uksi. pa省ajawaj patir蓹艐 to~u 魔afo~u涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u a tam涩~僧aw. ka蓹ma艐an mi魔蓹师a i **** mi魔蓹师a ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ** rmi省a涩~僧 maso~ufo~u师 itini i so~uo~u~ut魔wark no~u 蓹艐删an涩~僧 nijaro~u省 师i jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧, itira a mato~u省as, o~u saka sas蓹pat a wawa to~u sasiwaaj na艐ra a ma删蓹kaka. o~u mipa师o~ukaj to~u 省a省a涩~僧o~up蓹n ato~u tawki no~u ka删i蓹pa魔an ko~u mama ni 魔afo~u涩~僧, o~u mama no~u ina a ako~u艐 ni艐ra o~u ma删aii艐aj no~u nijaro~u省, o~u nano~u ma删蓹kapo~utaj to~u mama ni mikikiaj sas蓹pija (s魔ak蓹sp蓹ar蓹) a mataja删 i 师isifo~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a, o~una ta魔a删ifo~u艐 a mapataj ko~u mama ato~u sas蓹pataj a sa删蓹kaka to~u fa省inajan fafa魔ijan ni艐ra itija, iko~ur mi删ijaw 师i fa省inaj ko~u ina. itija i **** mi魔蓹师a mapatajra no~u mama ato~u ina 师i艐ra i 蓹mmano~u~u蓹删 kakko~ujin (aniniaj 师amb~b~vri涩~僧*蓹 涩~僧ajkako~u) minanam, i **** mi魔蓹师a misawa涩~僧 pa涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u 魔a师a minanam, i **** mi魔蓹师a 师inia删a to~u so~us蓹, nano~uja mapatir蓹艐 师i艐ra to~u ka删a fo~uksi. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, mararamo~u涩~僧 to~u safa to~u 师蓹fa艐 i 涩~僧ajkako~u ni 魔afo~u涩~僧 miti删i涩~僧 a fafa魔ijan, saka * mi魔蓹师a to~u ** fo~u删a涩~僧 ma删a魔ak蓹删o~u艐 tajra i n蓹w 蓹艐删an涩~僧 sa省蓹ta删 a 师魔ar删蓹sto~un nijaro~u省, o~uja aniniaj b~b~vo~usto~un i massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts sa省蓹ta删, itini to~uja nijaro~u省 a kiwkaj ma删afo~uksi ato~u ma删a师iw删o~u pasifana省aj. ro~u师o~uk a paro~ur i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, 师ia涩~僧a涩~僧a to~u fa删a省an mapataj 师i 魔afo~u, i省ajaw no~u pataj ni艐ra o~u ka删o~uti删i涩~僧 a 魔o~u艐 ato~u ma删ito~usaaj s蓹ra a pa删o~uma省an (sa删o~u艐an *** inpa艐 a pajso~u, o~u tato~u涩~僧o~u艐 no~u pi师a删ap to~u massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts 师蓹师ajaj mi魔蓹师a a mia删aan a sata) paf蓹删i蓹n ko~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj kakko~ujin (n蓹w 师o~u删删蓹*蓹, 师aajaj ko~uja o~uxfo~ur涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj kako~ujin). o~u pipato~u涩~僧o~u艐 to~u 艐a省ajaj a 涩~僧蓹mak, itijaaj ni师a删apaj 师ito~u涩~僧o~u艐aj mit蓹删蓹k no~u massa师魔o~u~us蓹tts i **** mi魔蓹师a mi师蓹ri艐 to~unini a kako~uji艐 fa删i师蓹n ko~u 艐a艐an "魔afo~u涩~僧 kako~ujin" 魔an to~u, o~uja iko~uraj 魔afo~u涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a, o~uja mito~u省to~u省aj 师i 涩~僧ani蓹删 fr蓹n师魔 mipata删a misa艐a省 to~u sina删it no~u jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 nasa, o~u nika魔a删afin to~u no~u mi魔蓹师aan, awaaj ko~u ni师o~ukaan a sijasin, saka 师i fr蓹n师魔 sato~u, mitama ni艐ra ko~u tato~u删o~uaj a mo~u涩~僧蓹删, masa艐a省 ko~u sina删it ni jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 . sa师iti删i涩~僧 sa i 删a蓹no~u a to~u删o~uaj ro~uwis: jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 , mipatir蓹艐aj tam涩~僧aw, ****. i **** mi魔蓹师a * fo~u删a涩~僧 ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, o~u sina删it ni jo~u魔ani 魔afo~u涩~僧 ma删ina魔 patajra i 删a删o~uma省an no~u piti删i涩~僧an, o~u misawa涩~僧aj naitini miti删i涩~僧aj sara魔蓹k蓹涩~僧 sa ko~u so~uwa删: o~unini a sina删it nai papo~uta删 mi师o~umo~u涩~僧 to~u i nijaro~u省, nai pa删apa删aan mi师o~umo~u涩~僧 to~u tajni 删a删o~uma省an. ka魔蓹makan a kat蓹艐i删an saki miti删i涩~僧aj no~u 魔afo~u涩~僧 涩~僧ajkako~u i, o~u 省a删o~umanaj miti删i涩~僧aj sito~u, 省ajaw no~u pis蓹ki艐 tajra i sina删it ni 魔afo~u涩~僧 mipo~u魔po~u魔 to~u ko~u师o~u~u saka 师i删蓹m蓹涩~僧 mis蓹ki艐, kamatini no~u ro~umi省a涩~僧an, o~unini a kawi删iaj wa省aj sato~um蓹删i省 sato~u. pi省arawan pin蓹艐n蓹艐 a ti删i涩~僧
